title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 13 2026
summary:
Main
Bulkers: S&P activity has been low in the opening weeks of 2026 as Japan and parts of Europe observedtheir national holidays last week. Nonetheless, larger tonnage demonstrated soft pricing, leading to a dip in values. Capesize Golden Magnum (179,800 DWT, 2009, Daewoo) sold to Chinese buyers for USD 28.7 mil, VV Value USD 29.6 mil
Kamsarmax Century Shanghai (82,000 DWT, 2018, Chengxi Shipyard) sold at auction for USD 25.0 mil, VV Value USD 27.5 mil
Tankers: VV VLCC Tanker values have firmed this week as a result of Sinokor's recent buying spree, setting a new benchmark for secondhand prices.
